questions.stem: The average height of 20 students is 105 cm. 10 more students with an average height of 120 cm join. What is the average height of all 30 students?

diagnostics.0: 115 would be correct only if both groups were equal in size. Weighted average needed.
diagnostics.2: 112.5 is the simple mean of 105 and 120, but the groups have different sizes (20 vs 10).
diagnostics.3: 108 is too low. Total height = 20×105 + 10×120 = 3300. Average = 3300/30 = 110.

hint.level_0: Find total height of each group, then find overall average.
hint.level_1: Total of 20 students = 20 × 105 = 2100. Total of 10 students = 10 × 120 = 1200.
